# Zynvo

> Zynvo is a behavioral layer for campus life. Students discover events and clubs, clubs manage and promote everything they run, and colleges get structured visibility into campus activity. LinkedIn for the journey before LinkedIn.

## What is Zynvo?

Zynvo (https://zynvosocial.com) is a campus platform for college students, club organisers, and colleges in India. It replaces scattered WhatsApp groups and notice boards with one loop: discovery for students, an operating system for clubs, and engagement visibility for institutions.

## Core Features

- **Campus event discovery**: Find fests, workshops, club nights, and RSVP in one feed.
- **Club management**: Profiles, members, announcements, and event promotion for societies.
- **Student engagement layer**: Structured campus activity colleges can actually see.
- **Zyncers (student profiles)**: Showcase clubs, skills, and campus involvement.
- **Campus feed & news**: Announcements and community posts from clubs.
- **Leaderboard & challenges**: Gamified participation.
- **AI assistant**: Help navigating campus life and opportunities.
- **PWA**: Installable on mobile from the browser.

## Who Is It For?

- **Students** — one feed to discover what matters on campus (`/for-students`, `/campus-event-app`)
- **Club presidents and organisers** — an OS to manage, promote, and run events (`/for-clubs`, `/club-management-software`)
- **Colleges** — analytics and visibility into campus activity (`/for-colleges`, `/student-engagement-platform`)

No major competitor currently connects all three audiences in one product loop.

## Founders

- **Anirban Ghosh** — CEO & Founder
- **Mohak Chakraborty** — COO
- **Swarnendu Ghosh** — CTO

Founded in 2026. Based in Kolkata, India.
